articles.title: Lammy says he told JD Vance his Nowak comments were 'wrong'
articles.description: Vance had blamed Henry Nowak's death on the "mass invasion of migrants" - but Lammy says it "has got nothing to do with mass migration".

articles.title: Christian Eriksen conscious after collapsing in Denmark game
articles.description: Christian Eriksen collapsed during Denmark's friendly against Ukraine but is now conscious, says the Danish Football Association.

articles.title: Zelensky's close European allies set out five conditions for peace talks
articles.description: The Ukrainian president's meeting with his staunchest European allies came as US President Donald Trump's focus shifts to the war with Iran.

articles.title: M&S launches new traineeship for 1,000 young people
